item.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness Cast Revealed—All Voice Actors Explained
item.content:encoded:
The long-awaited launch of Neverness to Everness has arrived, and players working their way through the game will likely have been left wondering why a voice is so recognisable, as the list of voice actors boasts an impressive combined CV.

The free-to-play gacha title offers tonnes of things to do in a GTA Online-style world, as well as offering a wide array of free rewards to earn via gameplay progression.

If you’re interested in knowing who the voice actors behind each character are, or are wondering where you recognize them from, Insider Gaming has all the details.

All Major Voice Actors in Neverness to Everness

Neverness to Everness has a stacked list of voice actors, including recognisable names and voices from the world of video games and anime.

The cast list boasts an impressive backlog of previous work, featuring everything from Fortnite to Genshin Impact, Digimon Story Time Stranger to JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure.

  • More Insider Gaming: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Twitch Drops & How to Get Them

In fact, we challenge you to take a look at the cast list and not recognise any of the names or previous roles they boast, such is the depth of the roster.

A full list of the voice actors appearing in Neverness to Everness, per IMDB, is shown in the table below.

Neverness to Everness Voice Actors’ Past Roles

If there are any names on the list above that you recognize but can’t quite place your finger on where you know them from, here’s a breakdown of some of the main actors and their previous roles.

Kira Buckland

Kira Buckland’s voice will likely be familar to those who are fans of media developed in East Asia, including games and anime, with a number of recognisable roles.

Buckland has voiced Laevatain in Arknights: Endfield, 2B in NieR: Automata, and Qingyi in Zenless Zone Zero, as well as having attributed involvement in the likes of Genshin Impact, Monster Hunter Wilds, and Xenoblade Chronicles.

In anime, their roles include Jolyne in JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, Mitsuri Kanroji in Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba, alongside recurring appearances in Re: Zero – Starting Life in Another World, That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime, and Rainbow High.

Griffin Burns

Griffin Burns has a similarly stacked CV, with attributed involvement in the likes of Genshin Impact, High on Life 2, Octopath Traveler 0, and Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater.

His named roles include Dan Yuki in Digimon Story Time Stranger, Raggy in Infinity Nikki, Joe in Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, and Keisuke Hiraga in Persona 3 Reload.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Reroll in NTE: Neverness to Everness

Bill Butts

Some of Bill Butts’ most recent recognisable involvements include voicing Reggie in Date Everything, Owlbert in Honkai: Star Rail, and Chronomon in Digimon Story Time Stranger, along with a one-episode role in the One Piece anime.

Other attributed roles include the announcer in Capcom Fighting Collection 2, Jeremiah Hopins in Fallout 76: Expeditions – Atlantic City, and Rudra in Street Fighter 6.

Allegra Clark

Allegra Clark may be the most recognisable voice in Neverness to Everness, with previous roles including Bloodhound in Apex Legends, both Maria and Blue Mary in Street Fighter 6, and Aza in The Outer Worlds 2.

In the anime world, Allegra has voiced Maiki Zen’in and Kasumi Miwa across 14 total episodes in Jujutsu Kaisen, alongside both Dorothea and Shamir in Fire Emblem: Three Houses.

Amber Lee Connors

Amber Lee Connors’ most recognisable roles include Pieck Finger and additional voices in Attack on Titan, VALERIE in The Outer Worlds 2, and Kanan Yuki in Digimon Story Time Stranger.

Other attributed involvement includes Genshin Impact, Borderlands 4, Dune: Awakening, and Persona 3 Reload.

Jacob Craner

Jacob Craner is known for his roles as Havik in Mortal Kombat, Robbie in Hyrule Warriors: Age of Calamity, and both Charlie and APAS in Death Stranding 2: On the Beach.

Other attributed roles and involvement include Halo Infinite, Arknights: Endfield, Octopath Traveler 0, Infinity Nikki, and Avowed.

  • More Insider Gaming: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Codes & How to Redeem Them

Alice Himora

Alice Himora’s voice will likely be most recognisable to players due to their roles as Robin in Honkai: Star Rail, Nekomiya Mana in Zenless Zone Zero, and Gullveig in Fire Emblem Heroes.

Elsewhere, Himora has roles with the likes of Pokémon Masters, Kingsblood, and Fire Emblem Heroes.

Brianna Knickerbocker

Brianna Knickerbocker is another whose voice likely stands out for many players, with past roles including Kanao Tsuyiri in Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba Infinite, Sakura in Fire Emblem: Fates, and Hu Tao in Genshin Impact.

Other roles include Mina in Story of Seasons: Grand Bazaar, Holly in Date Everything, and Livie in Infinity Nikki.

Suzie Yeung

If Suzie Yeung’s name doesn’t jump out at you, her voice certainly will, with previous roles including providing the voice of Hope in the Fortnite x The Simpsons Mini Series.

If that’s not enough, Yeung also voices Invisible Woman/Sue Storm in Marvel Rivals, and other Marvel titles, Textbox-Chan in Date Everything, Shimizu Hinako in Silent Hill f, and Kiku in Ghost of Yotei.

Which of the names and voices above in Neverness to Everness stands out to you most? Let us know in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Neverness to Everness, take a look at the file sizes and find out about the multiplayer options in the game.

MOBILE APP

item.title: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Twitch Drops & How to Get Them
item.content:encoded:
Neverness to Everness has finally launched globally, and for those looking to earn all the free awards you possibly can, there are even more goodies available through Twitch Drops.

A wide array of freebies are available in Neverness to Everness through pre-registration rewards, launch rewards, and gameplay progression, with the developers boasting that over 400 free rolls are available to earn.

If you’re on the hunt for everything you can get your hands on in Neverness to Everness and want to see all the Twitch Drop rewards, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Neverness to Everness Twitch Drops

Neverness to Everness has six separate Twitch Drop rewards available to earn, requiring a maximum watch time of two-and-a-half hours.

Rewards are available after just 15 minutes of watch time on Twitch in the Neverness to Everness category, so it’s relatively quick to earn everything that is available, especially if you’re passing the time waiting for the game to download, or your friends to come online.

  • More Insider Gaming: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Codes & How to Redeem Them

The available rewards include several types of in-game currency, and while they are all handy to have, there’s nothing exclusive that means tuning in to Twitch is a necessity.

Check out the table below for the full list of Twitch Drops available for Neverness to Everness, the amount of watch time required to earn them, and the dates they are available.

How to Get Neverness to Everness Twitch Drops

Two things are required to earn Twitch Drops in Neverness to Everness, as you’ll need an NTE account, as well as a Twitch account to connect to.

Fortunately, the process of connecting NTE and Twitch is simply and doesn’t take too much effort, and the fact all the rewards are earned after just two-and-a-half hours of watch time is considerably better than the rewards available for many other games, which can require up to four hours of watch time.

  • More Insider Gaming: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Pre-Registration Rewards & How to Get Them

Check out the full step-by-step process on claiming Twitch Drops for Neverness to Everness below.

  1. Head to the Neverness to Everness website using this link.
  2. Register or log in to your Neverness to Everness account.
  3. Log in to your Twitch account.
  4. Hit the ‘Link Now’ button to link Neverness to Everness with Twitch.
  5. Watch Neverness to Everness on Twitch for the required time to earn rewards.
  6. Claim any rewards earned through the in-game mailbox.

What are your early impressions of Neverness to Everness? Share your pulls in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Neverness to Everness, take a look at the file sizes and find out about the multiplayer options in the game.

MOBILE APP
